query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Gate report confirms PASS. Spawning the security reviewer.
[tool: Grep(PASS|FAIL|RESULT) → 5:> Result: PASS (with WARN)
11:| Root cause addressed | PASS | SQL JOIN fix targets the exact missing quarantine filter on both endpoints |
12:| No stubs / placeholders | PASS | No todo!(), unimplemented!(), TODO, FIXME in changed files |
13:| All tests pass | PASS | 4264 unit tests pass, 0 failed;]
[tool: Glob(product/features/bugfix-476/reports/*.md) → product/features/bugfix-476/reports/gate-bugfix-report.md]
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Gate 3c: always grep non-negotiable test names before accepting RISK-COVERAGE-REPORT PASS claims
Security reviewer must verify artifact paths exist before cold-read orientation
Intentional Pseudocode Deviations Must Surface as Explicit DEVIATION Block in Agent Report, Not as Design Notes
Missing agent-0/agent-1 reports are the most common bugfix gate failure pattern
